channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Activists hang Palestinian flag on the Eiffel Tower for Nakba Day
item.description: Members of Extinction Rebellion scaled the Eiffel Tower to hang a Palestinian flag for Nakba day.

item.title: Mahmoud Khalil calls for deportation to be halted in light of new evidence
item.description: Lawyers say new evidence suggests Trump admin 'engineered' outcome of case against pro-Palestine Columbia student.

item.title: What are World Cup 2026 national team base camps and their locations?
item.description: Training and accommodation locations for Argentina, Portugal, Spain, Brazil, England, Iran and other World Cup teams.

item.title: Seven killed in Gaza on Nakba Day as Israel says it targets Hamas member
item.description: Three women and a child among civilians killed in Israel's latest attacks on Gaza City.

item.title: What did Trump and Xi discuss during the China summit?
item.description: US President Donald Trump concluded a two-day summit in Beijing with Chinese leader Xi Jinping.

item.title: Cuba hit by protests, blackouts amid oil shortage
item.description: Cubans lit fires in Havana’s streets to protest electricity blackouts.

item.title: Ex-Sinaloa security chief in Mexico arrested in US over alleged cartel ties
item.description: Gerardo Merida Sanchez was arrested in Arizona on May 11 before being transferred to New York.

item.title: Trump calls journalist’s Iran reporting ‘treasonous’
item.description: Trump called New York Times journalist reporting on the Iran war as “treasonous” while claiming a 'victory'.

item.title: Pakistan’s Fatima Sana breaks world record for fastest 50 in women’s T20
item.description: Pakistan captain Sana scored 50 off 15 balls in a match-winning innings against Zimbabwe in Karachi.

item.title: Is the US dialling down its support for Taiwan?
item.description: Donald Trump does not commit to arms sale during China visit.

item.title: WHO confirms 10 global hantavirus cases, Hondius crew remain symptom-free
item.description: World Health Organization has reiterated that the risk of hantavirus spreading is 'low'.

item.title: Canada’s Carney travels to Alberta as separatists face legal setback
item.description: Trip comes as court rules separatists did not follow proper procedure in collecting referendum signatures.

item.title: Trump says China to buy 200 Boeing planes, much lower than expected
item.description: Neither the Chinese government nor Boeing issued statements confirming the purchase agreement.

item.title: Zelenskyy vows response after Russian strike kills 24 in Kyiv
item.description: Ukraine’s air force says the attack on Thursday was part of the largest aerial assault since the war began.

item.title: Trump departs China touting deals, but little clarity on Iran or Taiwan
item.description: Trump tells reporters he is still deciding fate of new Taiwan weapons package, says not "asking for any favors" on Iran.

item.title: Russia pounds Kyiv as its advance in eastern Ukraine slows to a crawl
item.description: Ukraine has prevented Russian arms and fuel from reaching the front line in a successful disruption campaign.

item.title: Hantavirus: how scared should we be?
item.description: Three deaths linked to a hantavirus outbreak on a cruise ship have revived memories of COVID-19. What has the world lear

item.title: UAE to accelerate oil pipeline project to bypass Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The crown prince of the UAE says the project would help 'meet global demands'.

item.title: BRICS talks end without joint statement as divisions over Iran war deepen
item.description: Iran's FM had urged member states to condemn 'violations of international law by the United States and Israel'.

item.title: FA Cup final: Chelsea vs Manchester City – teams, start, lineups
item.description: Manchester City will continue their hunt for a domestic treble when they face Chelsea in Saturday's FA Cup final.

item.title: Israel kills seven in Lebanon, agrees ‘ceasefire’ extension at talks in US
item.description: Delegations meet in Washington as Lebanon demands an end to Israeli attacks and occupation of its territory.

item.title: Iran says lack of trust is the main obstacle in US negotiations
item.description: Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said that a deep mistrust with the US continues to hinder negotiations

item.title: California county scam ad lawsuit adds to mounting Meta legal woes
item.description: Santa Clara accuses Meta of failing to regulate scam adds, months after landmark ruling against social media giants.

item.title: India and UAE sign defence pacts, as Iran war tensions simmer
item.description: A deal inked during Modi's visit to the UAE focuses on maritime security, cyberdefence, and military collaboration.

item.title: How the far right got its name
item.description: The far right has gone from fringe to mainstream - but political scientists say the term is often misused.
